 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Midway Handicap

1200m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, BM72, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis
Pro Tips
Free Tips
James Molony

WINNER

22/08/25
1st
5. Signor Tortoni
R1
Randwick
23/08/25
Resulted
Units Staked Units
Profit

We adopt a unit betting system. Profits are calculated by units won multiplied by the unit value.

All calculations assume a $10 per unit staked.

 Bet Type Tipped Price Price
What is the Tipped Price?

The Tipped Price is the odds that were available when the Expert placed their tip. This allows you to see if the odds have fluctuated since the Expert placed their tip.

 Units Won
6 To Win $2.65 +9.9

Randwick R1 no. 5- SIGNOR TORTONI may be able to settle forward off more modest early splits after he went too quick early before sustaining a wide run when struggling to go on with it late over 1300m at Randwick last start.

Results

1st -

5. Signor Tortoni

(5)
4yo
(G)
